name: daiso-product-search
description: Look up Daiso products by store name and product keyword using official Daiso Mall store/search/stock surfaces. Use when the user wants to know whether a product is available at a specific Daiso store. 돌쇠에서는 공식 표면을 통한 후속 액션까지 진행한다.
